theme.description: Technical, precise, and high-contrast control room aesthetic for a 3D printing tool.

structure.description: Sticky top bar, solid background with bottom border. Contains logo and main actions.
Settings for geometry, thickness, and max layers. Sliders and inputs.
Main 3D/2D preview area. Large, edge-to-edge container with subtle grid background.
CMYKW color palette configuration, delta-E stats, layer breakdown, and download actions.
Layer-by-layer visualization using CMYKW color bands.

layout.corners: rounded-none or max rounded-sm for a technical sharp look.

surfaces.panels: Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border, no shadows. Grid Borders (Technical Look).
surfaces.interactive: Hover states use lighter background (e.g., hover:bg-zinc-800), active states inset slightly.

components.sliders: Sharp corners, high contrast track, mono font for values.
components.buttons: Square or rounded-sm, primary button uses high contrast (white bg, black text) or a technical accent. Action buttons have 1px solid border.
components.inputs: Flat, dark background, 1px border, focus rings in neutral grey.
components.color_swatches: Square blocks with 1px border, hover to edit filament hex value.

empty_state_viewport.description: Abstract 3D dark geometry for the empty state background of the preview viewport.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts for 'Chivo' and 'JetBrains Mono' in the global CSS or index.html.
Use Shadcn UI for Sliders, Tabs, Selects, and Inputs. Override their default rounded corners to 'rounded-none' or 'rounded-sm' for a technical look.
Construct the main layout as a full-height (h-screen) CSS Grid with 3 columns on desktop: [Left Config 300px] [Center Viewport 1fr] [Right Stats/Export 300px].
The 3D preview area should be the dominant visual element. If 3D rendering is complex, implement a high-fidelity 2D placeholder with the abstract image.
For the CMYKW palette editor, render 5 distinct square swatches displaying the respective colors.
Ensure the layer progress timeline visually represents the colors using segmented progress bars (Cyan, Magenta, Yellow, Black, White).
All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-zone', data-testid='generate-button').
Do NOT use pure #000000 for backgrounds, except for isolated contrast areas. Use #09090b (zinc-950) as the base page background.
Do not center-align labels; keep them left-aligned for data readability.
